mapper.sql: p.product_code, p.manufacturer_code, p.product_name, p.product_desc, p.unit_price, p.stock_quantity, p.min_stock, p.weight, p.status, p.create_time, p.update_time, m.manufacturer_name
mapper.select: SELECT FROM product p LEFT JOIN manufacturer m ON p.manufacturer_code = m.manufacturer_code WHERE p.product_code = #{productCode}
SELECT FROM product p LEFT JOIN manufacturer m ON p.manufacturer_code = m.manufacturer_code WHERE p.stock_quantity <= p.min_stock AND p.status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (product_code, manufacturer_code, product_name, product_desc, unit_price, stock_quantity, min_stock, weight, status) VALUES (#{productCode}, #{manufacturerCode}, #{productName}, #{productDesc}, #{unitPrice}, #{stockQuantity}, #{minStock}, #{weight}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET stock_quantity = stock_quantity + #{quantity} WHERE product_code = #{productCode}
